# Model Routing

## Purpose

Use the right model for the job.

## Routing

| Task | Model class |
|---|---|
| strategic diagnosis | strongest reasoning |
| math model selection | strongest reasoning |
| source synthesis | strong long-context |
| copy variations | fast creative model |
| grading | strong model different from writer |
| formatting | cheap model |
| simulation code | coding agent |
| platform packet | coding/structured-output model |

## Rule

Do not spend frontier reasoning budget on Markdown formatting.
